title: halimolobos parryi
intro: Halimolobos parryi, also known as Franseria parryi or Franseria douglasii, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Halimolobos parryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
